subject: [MULTICLOUD] Remove multicloud-azure from release
commit_message:
[MULTICLOUD] Remove multicloud-azure from release

multicloud-azure is descoped from H release

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1309

Signed-off-by: Bin Yang <bin.yang@windriver.com>
Change-Id: I2350d6fe82ceae4e16ce9e5ef929c6e7d5d42c45
[Instead of disabling let's remove it]
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/961/ : FAILURE

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/961/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/961/ )
